name: appointment-book
_note: calendar.appointment-book is a LENS_ACTIONS (PATH 3) handler that reserves a slot on the caller's per-user appointment schedule. FAIL-CLOSED: a missing/unknown scheduleId rejects ('schedule not found'); a slotStart not matching ^YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss$ rejects ('valid slotStart required'); an empty bookerName rejects; a slot already in schedule.bookings rejects ('slot already booked') — so double-booking is impossible. Cancelling a booking restores availability. Per-user isolation: the schedule is looked up in s.appointmentSchedules.get(aidCal(ctx)), so another user can neither see nor book it. macro-assassin drives runMacro (no LENS_ACTIONS resolution); behavioral suite is the driver. No CC, no network.
